programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Adam and guests, fabulous food writer Hetty Lui McKinnon and remarkable TV and podcast host Zan Rowe are in the express lane, cooking dinner with 12 ingredients or less.

programs.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programs.desc: Convinced that Arkadia is nearby and that he has no place in the city, Spartakus makes his farewell. No sooner has he left our heroes than the pirates appear and take them prisoner.

programs.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programs.desc: Esteban and his friends take a ride on the Great Condor. Initially, they struggle to pilot the bird, but they quickly discover its similarities to the Solaris.

programs.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programs.desc: Esteban is hoping to tell Kraka everything that happened on the mountain of the goddess Pacha Mama, and also show him the Great Condor.

programs.title: Chums
programs.desc: The chums discover a young loon lost in the wilderness and must work together to find her family.

programs.title: Motown Magic
programs.sub_title: Easy And Reach Out I'll Be There
programs.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of Motown.
